reach_why: Extends familiar critiques of inductive bias and retrospective validation, but does not open fundamentally new explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links ontology shift, human taste filters, and hindsight reinterpretation into one critique of discovery claims.
falsifiable_why: Test by comparing filtered systems on genuinely novel ontology-shifting discoveries versus retrospective reconstructions.
explanation: It argues hindsight-friendly filters mimic discovery while blocking ontology-changing novelty.
